LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM WAGE GARNISHMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FINANCIAL STATEMENT DEMONSTRATES THAT HIS EXPENSES ARE GREATER THAN HIS EARNINGS AND THEREFORE HIS WAGES ARE EXEMPT. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AND MAIL TO PARTIES. JUDGE ERNEST H. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger Brown, in pro per, Tel. 415.240.3450, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant's Claim Of Exemption from wage garnishment is granted. Defendant's financial statement demonstrates that his expenses are greater than his earnings and therefore his wages are exempt. The Court shall prepare the order and mail to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROGER LEE BROWN, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company's Hearing On ROGER LEE BROWN'S Claim Of Exemption
is off calendar as moot. The San Francisco County Sherriff's office terminated the levy. CLERK TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROGER LEE BROWN, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court VACATED ITS TENTATEIVE RULING. THE COURT CONTINUES HEARING ON Plaintiff FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY'S OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S Claim Of Exemption TO DECEMBER 3, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. Order signed AFTER HEARING. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
